title: Yosys issue error in propagating parameter from one module to other module: ERROR: implicitly declared outside of a module.

features.name: parameter defined via preprocessor macro in include file
features.description: Code should include a parameter definition inside an `ifdef/`ifndef protected preprocessor macro block in a header file

features.name: cross_file_macro_parameter_reference
features.description: Code should include a second include file that references a parameter defined via macro from a previously included file
features.snippet:
`ifndef INCLUDE_B_DEFS
`define INCLUDE_B_DEFS
parameter bit [31:0] MTRIG_NUM = TRIG_NUM;
`endif

features.name: multiple_read_verilog_sv_file_loads
features.description: Code should include loading multiple SystemVerilog files sequentially with read_verilog -sv where include files share macro definitions across files
